title: sonchus regius
intro: Sonchus regius, also known as royal sowthistle, is a plant species within the dandelion family with edible leaves and roots. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds, which have been found to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Sonchus regius are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including infusions, teas, and tinctures, to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
